notes: Towers are invisible and the game thinks it's not connected to the internet so I can't load my profile from the mobile version. Some sound weirdness too.
title: Bloons TD 6

notes: The Wine d3d11 tweak makes towers render properly, but the game seems to freeze when clicking on the Profile button. Besides this and some other minor issues, the game works mostly perfectly.
title: Bloons TD 6
